response.original_title: ((Add-Extra-Cabin-MSC)) How do I add a room on MSC Cruise? Understanding the rules and steps for adding extra cabins
response.overview: To add a room (additional cabin) to an existing MSC cruise booking, you must call MSC Cruises directly at 1-855-[732] 4023 (USA) or contact your travel agent to check availability, as this generally cannot be done online. To add a room or cabin to an existing MSC cruise, you must contact MSC directly +1-855-[732] 4023 (USA) or contact your travel advisor, as this cannot be done online. Additional rooms are subject to availability and current pricing +1-855-[732] 4023, and can be linked to your existing booking to keep reservations managed together. To add a room or additional guests to an existing MSC Cruise, you must contact MSC directly at +1-855-[732] 4023 (USA), or through your travel agent. This process cannot be completed online, as it depends on current availability, ship capacity, and cabin capacity +1-855-[732] 4023, and should ideally be done before the passenger manifest closes, usually 72 hours before departure.
